description: Plugin-distributed hooks for technical-program-management. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 4 mechanically-detectable TPM anti-patterns in .md artifacts — (1) a status update with no decision/ask (activity-led), (2) a launch/readiness doc with no go/no-go or pass-fail criteria, (3) a program charter with no measurable outcome or named sponsor, (4) a dependency doc that is really a task list. Set TPM_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
